parentId.description: The ID of the parent entry.

fullPath.description: The full path in the Laserfiche repository to the entry.

folderPath.description: The path in the Laserfiche repository to the parent folder.

creator.description: The name of the user that created this entry.

creationTime.description: The creation time of the entry.

lastModifiedTime.description: The last modification time of the entry.

isContainer.description: A boolean indicating if this entry is a container object; it can have other entries as children.

isLeaf.description: A boolean indicating if this entry is a leaf object; it cannot have other entries as children.

templateName.description: The name of the template assigned to this entry.

templateId.description: The id of the template assigned to this entry.

templateFieldNames.description: The names of the fields assigned to the template assigned to this entry.

volumeName.description: The name of the volume that this entry is associated with.

rowNumber.description: Row number assigned to this entry in the listing.

fields.description: The fields assigned to this entry.

RecordsManagementProperties.description:
The records management properties of an entry. This is the abstract base; the concrete shape is
RecordProperties for a document record (RecordType = Record)
or RecordFolderProperties for a record folder (RecordFolder). Members
common to both record and record folder live here; type-specific members live on the subtypes.
Many members are computed by the repository and are read-only â€” they are noted as such and are
ignored on update.

recordType.description:
Whether these properties describe a document record or a record folder. Determines the
concrete subtype (RecordProperties or RecordFolderProperties)
and which type-specific members are present.

isCutoff.description: True when the entry has been cut off. Computed (read-only).

isEligibleForCutoff.description: True when the entry is currently eligible for cutoff. Computed (read-only).

isEligibleForFinalDisposition.description: True when the entry is currently eligible for final disposition. Computed (read-only).

cutoffDate.description: The date the entry was cut off, or null if not cut off. Computed (read-only).

cutoffEligibility.description: The date the entry becomes eligible for cutoff, or null. Computed (read-only).

finalDispositionEligibility.description: The date the entry becomes eligible for final disposition, or null. Computed (read-only).

dispositionConfirmationDate.description: The date final disposition was confirmed, or null. Computed (read-only).

transferDates.description: Projected and completed interim transfers. Computed (read-only).

locationId.description: The records management location the entry currently resides at, or null. Computed (read-only).

activeDispositionScheduleId.description: The disposition schedule currently governing the entry (own or inherited), or null. Computed (read-only).

cutoffCriterionId.description: The cutoff criterion assigned to the entry, or null when none.

dispositionScheduleId.description: The disposition schedule assigned to the entry, or null when none.

filingDate.description: The filing date, or null when unset.

triggerDate.description: The alternate-retention trigger date, or null when unset.
